debug_info.goal:
n : ℕ
f : GlobalTheorem.E✝ n → ℝ
fc : ContDiff ℝ 2 f
x y : GlobalTheorem.E✝ n
ε : ℝ
hε : ε > 0
hdiff : failed to pretty print expression (use 'set_option pp.rawOnError true' for raw representation)
mpb : mixed_partials_bounded f x
g₀ : ℝ → GlobalTheorem.E✝ n := GlobalTheorem.interpolator✝ n x y
g : ℝ → ℝ := GlobalTheorem.interpolated✝ n x y f
g' : ℝ → ℝ := GlobalTheorem.interpolated_deriv✝ n x y f
g'' : ℝ → ℝ := GlobalTheorem.interpolated_deriv2✝ n x y f
f_diff : Differentiable ℝ f
g₀_diff : Differentiable ℝ g₀
g_diff : Differentiable ℝ g
⊢ Differentiable ℝ g'

proof:
show Differentiable ℝ (interpolated_deriv x y f)
    unfold interpolated_deriv
    have interp_diff : Differentiable ℝ (fun t : ℝ => (1 - t) • x + t • y) := by fun_prop
    have h_fderiv_diff : Differentiable ℝ (fderiv ℝ f) :=
      (fc.fderiv_right (m := 1) (by norm_cast)).differentiable (by norm_cast)
    have h_term : ∀ i : Fin n, Differentiable ℝ (fun t : ℝ => (y i - x i) * nth_partial i f ((1 - t) • x + t • y)) := by
      intro i; unfold nth_partial
      exact (((ContinuousLinearMap.apply ℝ ℝ (EuclideanSpace.single i 1)).differentiable.comp h_fderiv_diff).comp interp_diff).const_mul _
    have h : Differentiable ℝ (∑ i : Fin n, (fun t : ℝ => (y i - x i) * nth_partial i f ((1 - t) • x + t • y))) :=
      Differentiable.sum fun i _ => h_term i
    convert h using 1
    ext t
    simp [Finset.sum_apply]
successful_attempts:

    have h_fderiv_diff : Differentiable ℝ (fderiv ℝ f) :=

    have h_term : ∀ i : Fin n, Differentiable ℝ (fun t : ℝ => (y i - x i) * nth_partial i f ((1 - t) • x + t • y)) := by
      intro i; unfold nth_partial
      exact (((ContinuousLinearMap.apply ℝ ℝ (EuclideanSpace.single i 1)).differentiable.comp h_fderiv_diff).comp interp_diff).const_mul _
    have h : Differentiable ℝ (∑ i : Fin n, (fun t : ℝ => (y i - x i) * nth_partial i f ((1 - t) • x + t • y))) :=
